recent_log: 2026-06-23: Trivial bug fix — SaleOrderForm.jsx left-column "Lens Price" display input was bound to stale formData.lensPrice instead of effectiveBreakdown.lensPrice, so it didn't update when an Exchange Coating offer was applied even though "Base Lens Price" did. Changed display value to effectiveBreakdown?.lensPrice ?? formData.lensPrice (submit payload was already correct). KB-013 added.

2026-06-23: Trivial bug fix — saleOrderService.js createSaleOrder() wasn't saving rightEyeExtra/leftEyeExtra/tintingPrice on create (only update path saved them), causing Sale Order view-mode total to undercount vs the Calculate Price modal (640 vs 890). Added the 3 missing fields to the create payload. KB-012 added. Existing pre-fix orders are not backfilled.

2026-06-21: dashboard-sales-widgets DONE. KB-010 added. All 9 original backlog items now DONE: pnl-asset-liability-fix, vendor-payment-receipt-voucher, invoice-quick-close, dispatch-delivery-agent-filter, invoice-preview, expense-direct-indirect-categories, coa-hide-balance-values, production-quality-scanning, dashboard-sales-widgets.

2026-06-21: Nothing committed to git yet this session -- all 9 features' changes sit together uncommitted in the working tree. Two new Prisma migrations (vendor-payment-receipt-voucher, expense-direct-indirect-categories) not yet applied to any DB. Backlog empty, awaiting new work.

2026-06-21: Docker infra fix (not a feature, KB-011 added). Root docker-compose.yml was unbuildable (stale absolute dockerfile paths from another project, npm Ci typo, wrong env var names, missing root .dockerignore). Built a working dev stack in new Dev_lens/ folder (own .env + docker-compose.yml, ports 6001/6002/6013/6014); fixed Dockerfile.backend (npm ci) and Dockerfile.frontend (healthcheck IPv4 fix); applied all 30 Prisma migrations to the fresh Dev_lens postgres DB. All 4 containers (postgres, backend, frontend, pgadmin) confirmed healthy and serving. Root docker-compose.yml left as-is/legacy -- still broken, superseded by Dev_lens/.
